allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./e2e-test2.json''\); d.checks.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.id+'': ''+c.status+'' [''+c.duration+''] - ''+c.summary\)\); console.log\(''---''\); console.log\(''Gate:'', d.status, ''| Issues:'', d.totalIssues\); console.log\(''Ratings:'', JSON.stringify\(d.ratings\)\); console.log\(''Duplication:'', d.summary.duplicationPercent+''%''\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./e2e-test3.json''\); console.log\(''Gate:'', d.status, ''| Issues:'', d.totalIssues\); console.log\(''Ratings:'', JSON.stringify\(d.ratings\)\); const dup=d.checks.find\(c=>c.id===''duplication''\); console.log\(''Dup clones:'', dup.metrics.clones, ''| Dup issues:'', \(dup.issues||[]\).length\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Status: {d[""status""]}''''\); [print\(f''''  {c[""name""]}: {c[""status""]} - {c[""summary""]}''''\) for c in d[''''checks'''']]")
